name: Bug Report
about: Report a bug in the Google Antigravity SDK (Rust)

## Environment

- **SDK version**: (e.g., 0.1.0 — check `Cargo.toml`)
- **Rust version**: (output of `rustc --version`)
- **OS / platform**: (e.g., macOS ARM64, Linux x86_64)
- **Install method**: (e.g., git dependency, local path)

## Description

A clear description of the bug.

## Steps to Reproduce

1. ...
2. ...

## Expected Behavior

What you expected to happen.

## Actual Behavior

What actually happened. Include error messages and stack traces if applicable.

## Additional Context

Any other relevant information (logs, screenshots, etc.).
